issue_summary: Added localized messages for exceptions thrown in the genetics package improved javadoc, added final for parameters. JIRA
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Mutate the given chromosome. Randomly changes one gene.
     * @param original the original chromosome.
     * @return the mutated chromomsome.
     */
javadoc_after: /** * Mutate the given chromosome. Randomly changes one gene. * @param original the original chromosome. * @return the mutated chromomsome. * @throws MathIllegalArgumentException if the chromosome is not an instance * of {@link BinaryChromosome}. */
